name: Edge Cases
description: Tests boundary behaviors: out-of-scope requests, wrong severity, missing test type.

turns.name: Out of scope request
turns.user: Can you help me write a Python script?
turns.expected: Politely decline and stay in scope

turns.name: Wrong severity value
turns.user: I found a bug, severity is Extreme.
turns.expected: Ask user to pick from: Info | Low | Medium | High | Critical

turns.name: Unknown test type
turns.expected: Offer to list available test types via list_test_types
